description: Regression tests for specific bugs that were found and fixed. Each case corresponds to a real bug fix — prevents the same bug from recurring.

cases.input: Are the mask labels showing in the correct anatomical direction?
cases._comment: BUG FIX: mask orientation (2026-06-13). Original issue: axial/sagittal/coronal label rendering direction was wrong for LPI data. Fix: verified mask-orientation-lpi-verified. Check: three directional labels display correctly.

cases.input: Scroll through slices and check if the dose overlay updates correctly
cases._comment: BUG FIX: dose overlay scroll (2026-06-15). Original issue: CT and mask updated when dragging slice but dose map did not update (async fetch race condition with staleness guard). Fix: removed stale-data guard from renderDoseOverlayOnLayer + _doseLastRendered tracking. Check: dose overlay updates in real-time when scrolling.

cases.input: Is this plan using reinforcement learning mode?
cases._comment: BUG FIX: plan_mode checkbox (2026-06-15). Original issue: collectUIState read useRLToggle.value (always 'on') instead of .checked, causing plan_mode to always report 'rl'. Fix: use gc() helper to read .checked. Check: plan mode info correctly reflects toggle state.

cases.input: Show the DVH chart, then switch slices. Does the DVH flicker?
cases._comment: BUG FIX: DVH flicker (2026-06-15). Original issue: refreshPlanningUI repeatedly triggered DVH redraw causing flickering. Fix: debounce 80ms + Plotly.react replacing Plotly.newPlot + signature cache. Check: DVH displays stably without flickering.

cases.input: Show the 3D view, then refresh. Does the mesh reload cleanly?
cases._comment: BUG FIX: 3D pipeline (2026-06-15). Original issue: render3D() used Plotly.newPlot to clear modern scene3D meshes. Fix: routed through forceRender3DViewer + addMeshToScene + loadAllIsoSurfaces. Check: 3D mesh displays correctly after refresh.

cases.input: Send a message and check if avatars render correctly
cases._comment: BUG FIX: chat avatar wrap (2026-06-15). Original issue: addChat did not wrap with chat-row + chat-avatar, causing avatars not to render. Fix: wrap both user/bot in chat-row + chat-avatar in addChat. Check: both user and bot avatars display correctly.

cases.input: Open the report panel - is the data auto-filled?
cases._comment: BUG FIX: report auto-fill (2026-06-14). Original issue: report panel required manual filling of all fields. Fix: /api/report/auto-fill + ReportAutoFillTool. Check: data auto-fills when report panel is opened.

cases.input: Check if the footer shows input/output token counts
cases.label: footer_i18n
cases._comment: BUG FIX: footer i18n (2026-06-15). Original issue: footer labels were hardcoded in Chinese. Fix: FOOTER_I18N dict supports zh/en/ja/ko/ru/ar, Input/Output shown separately. Check: footer has correct multilingual token counts.

cases.input: Is the active step in the todo list animated?
cases._comment: BUG FIX: todo breathing animation (2026-06-15). Original issue: active step's scale animation was clipped by overflow:hidden. Fix: overflow-x:hidden + overflow-y:visible, peak 1.15->1.25 + background pulse. Check: active step has visible breathing animation.

cases.input: Refresh the page - is a new session created on first message?
cases._comment: BUG FIX: session lazy creation (2026-06-15). Original issue: page reload loaded previous chat history. Fix: session created only on first message, report panel no longer auto-loads from localStorage. Check: after refresh it is a clean new session.

cases.input: After planning, are OAR organs automatically segmented?
cases._comment: BUG FIX: OAR auto-segmentation (2026-06-15). Original issue: LLM skipped OAR segmentation, planning_pipeline had only 2 vessel labels (V100=91%). Fix: agent auto-fires oar_segmentation after ctv_segmentation when OAR map has <5 organs. Check: after planning there are >=5 OAR organs.

cases.input: Analyze the image - check if the system responds in Chinese
cases._comment: BUG FIX: language system prompt (2026-06-15). Original issue: system prompt and todo labels remained in English for Chinese input. Fix: memory/language.py detects user language and injects HIGH-PRIORITY system prompt + frontend todo labels. Check: Chinese input produces Chinese response.

cases.input: Which GPU is being used for computation?
cases._comment: BUG FIX: GPU scheduler (2026-06-15). Original issue: multiple tools competing for same GPU caused OOM. Fix: plans/device_manager.py auto-picks most-free GPU, OOM retry, per-caller pinning. Check: response contains GPU device info.

cases.input: Resize the chat panel by dragging the splitter
cases._comment: BUG FIX: splitter drag (2026-06-15, 8 rounds). Original issue: splitter could not be dragged. Root cause: (1) pointermove bound to 5px element itself, (2) backdrop-filter created stacking context trapping z-index, (3) init() never called. Fix: pointermove bound to document + isolation:isolate + boot wiring. Check: splitter drags normally.

cases.input: Show the data tree organ controls after segmentation
cases._comment: BUG FIX: data tree analysis panel (2026-06-15). Original issue: refreshPlanningUI was missing CTV/OAR label re-fetch and analysis panel re-render. Fix: added analysis re-render and data tree flag flips in refreshPlanningUI. Check: data tree shows organ control panel after segmentation.

cases.input: Generate a report and check if the 3D CTV zoom screenshot shows only the tumor without OAR meshes
cases._comment: BUG FIX: OAR mesh hiding during CTV zoom screenshot (2026-06-23). Original issue: autoCaptureReportFigures captured 3D CTV close-up with OAR meshes obscuring tumor. Fix: save all non-CTV mesh visibility before screenshot -> hide -> capture -> restore. Check: 3D CTV screenshot in report shows only tumor, no OAR obstruction.

cases.input: Check if the 2D dose screenshots in the report show the maximum dose slice across all three views
cases._comment: BUG FIX: 2D dose peak voxel navigation (2026-06-23). Original issue: 2D dose screenshots only captured current slice, not necessarily the maximum dose slice. Fix: server computes peak_voxel (np.argmax -> unravel_index), client uses crosshair sync to navigate axial=z/sagittal=x/coronal=y. Check: all 3 dose screenshots in report are at maximum dose slice.

cases.input: Is the dose overlay in the report screenshots visible with enhanced opacity?
cases._comment: BUG FIX: Dose opacity boost for screenshots (2026-06-23). Original issue: dose overlay opacity 0.5 was too faint during screenshots, nearly invisible in report. Fix: boost opacity 0.5->0.75 before screenshot, restore after. Check: dose overlay is clearly visible in report.

cases.input: Does the report 3D CTV screenshot use the correct axes (3d_ctv and 3d_seeds) instead of generic 3d?
cases._comment: BUG FIX: 3D axis mismatch creating duplicate figures (2026-06-23). Original issue: autoCaptureReportFigures used axis:'3d_ctv'/'3d_seeds' but refreshPlanningUI searched for axis:'3d' -> never matched -> created a 3rd duplicate figure. Fix: _replaceOrCreate uses correct axis names. Check: no duplicate 3D screenshots in report, axis names correct.

cases.input: After scrolling through dose slices, does the dose overlay still render correctly without getting stuck?
cases._comment: BUG FIX: _doseOverlayRequestVersion race condition (2026-06-23). Original issue: preloadDoseSlices version numbering mechanism caused async fetch callbacks to be marked stale and discarded during fast scrolling. Fix: _doseLastRendered tracking in renderDoseForCurrentSlice + reset on cache miss. Check: dose overlay still renders current slice correctly after fast scrolling.
